text:
Small Beetle (小甲虫型, Kokabutomushi-gata—lit. "Small Beetle-type") Hunter × Hunter - Episode 96 (2011) was a beetle-like Chimera Ant Officer working under Zazan. 

Appearance

Small Beetle was a beetle-like Ant with a head similar to that of "Ultraman", a protuberance/ridge in the head similar to a Mohawk hairstyle, square ears, and no nose. Small Beetle had four arms and two legs and held a joystick. He has been shown in the manga sometimes with a "button" in his chest and skin-wings on his back.

Personality

Small Beetle was loyal and cocky as well as observant, and did not like being patronized when he talked about making someone his "Slave" to work to death for the Queen. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

During the Phantom Troupe's siege on Zazan's Palace, Small Beetle manipulates another Chimera Ant soldier, Pell, into fighting Shalnark. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 22, Chapter 225 Confident that he won against Pell and is now under his control, Shalnark briefly lowers his guard and Pell restrains him. Small Beetle reveals himself and that he was already manipulating Pell with his joystick controller. Small Beetle then informs Shalnark that he'll put his own personal antenna onto Shalnark, deliver him to the Queen, and his job will be complete. 

After a back-and-forth conversation on what will happen to Shalnark when he comes under Small Beetle's control. Shalnark reveals that he has a second antenna on his person and uses it on himself to activate his Autopilot mode Nen ability. Anxious and overcome with fear, Small Beetle tries to get Pell to remove the antenna from Shalnark's leg; however, Shalnark breaks free from his restriction and obliterates both Pell and Small Beetle in a single strike. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 22, Chapter 227 

Abilities & Powers

As a Chimera Ant, Small Beetle is already stronger than the average human. 

Enhanced Durability: His body is considerably durable, since a punch from a Nen-using Rammot Hunter × Hunter - Volume 19, Chapter 198 did not leave him with any permanent or visible injury, but he was still completely destroyed by Shalnark. 

Nen

Small Beetle is a Manipulator. After sticking his antenna on his target, he can remotely control it as he pleases through a device that looks like a game joystick. He might be able to control more than one target at once.

Manga Appearances

Battles

Trivia

The character's true name was never given in the manga, and the 2011 anime adaptation only identifies him by his type of species in the credits.
He is referred to as 小甲虫 (Kokabutomushi, literally "Small Beetle").
In the credits for the English dub: "Small Beetle". 
In the original Japanese text, Small Beetle refers to himself with the unique first-person pronoun "boki" (ボキ), a seeming corruption of the common masculine first-person pronoun boku (ぼく).

Intertextuality and References

Small Beetle's character design, particularly his head, bears a strong resemblance to that of Ultraman, a fictional Japanese superhero.

Miscellaneous

Small Beetle shares the same voice actor as Shoot McMahon.
